best_option.description: Born term retained but solvation-shell/dielectric-saturation option disabled.

baseline_option.description: Existing replay behavior: strip legacy electrolyte option keys and let package defaults construct add_args.

parameter_audit.equilibrium_row_count_note: The 2025 SI Tables S1/S2 provide 26 designed-experiment equilibrium rows. The 2026 text mentions 36 data points, but this scan treats that as a clerical source-text mismatch unless a new source table is supplied.
notes: Organic phase uses Rezaee Table 4/6/8 pure parameters and Table 9 binary interactions without refitting.
Aqueous phase uses the package ePC-SAFT component catalog for H2O, Li+, Na+, Cl-, H+, OH-, and a local NH4+ cation placeholder to match the SI composition columns.
Option scan changes only the aqueous electrolyte model configuration; organic parameters and reaction constants remain fixed to the paper values.

option_metadata.description: Existing replay behavior: strip legacy electrolyte option keys and let package defaults construct add_args.
Legacy/default aqueous ePC-SAFT option payload converted to the current nested package API.
Current 2025 preset with Born term, solvation-shell model, and empirical dielectric rule.
Current 2025 aqueous parameters with Born contribution disabled and empirical dielectric rule retained.
Current 2025 aqueous parameters with Born contribution disabled and constant dielectric rule.
Current 2025 aqueous parameters with Born contribution disabled and linear mole-fraction dielectric rule.
Born term retained but solvation-shell/dielectric-saturation option disabled.
Born plus solvation-shell model retained with the mu Born sum term disabled.
Born retained without solvation-shell model and with the mu Born sum term disabled.
Born retained with composition-dependent relative permittivity disabled in the chemical-potential derivative.
Born retained but bulk relative permittivity taken from the solvent mode instead of mixture mode.

failed_options.description: Current 2025 preset with Bjerrum treatment enabled.
failed_options.message: Bjerrum treatment is reserved; DH_model=2 has no active public route.
